description: Trigger evals for the ursamu-dev skill. should_trigger prompts must select ursamu-dev; should_not_trigger prompts must NOT (they target collision-prone sibling skills).

should_trigger.prompt: Scaffold a new UrsaMU plugin called 'jukebox' with one +play command and a REST route to list tracks.
should_trigger.rationale: Names UrsaMU explicitly, plugin scaffold + addCmd + registerPluginRoute — squarely in skill scope.

should_trigger.prompt: Add a +setflag command to my UrsaMU plugin that toggles a boolean in u.db on the target player. Lock to admin+.
should_trigger.rationale: addCmd + u.db.modify + lock expression — core skill territory.

should_trigger.prompt: Wire a gameHooks.on('player:login') handler in my UrsaMU plugin's init() that sends a MOTD via joinSocketToRoom.
should_trigger.rationale: gameHooks + v2.x socketId/joinSocketToRoom pattern — should pull stage-1 reference.

should_trigger.prompt: Design a DBO<INote> collection for my UrsaMU notes-plugin with id/playerId/text/date fields and add CRUD commands.
should_trigger.rationale: DBO + plugin-scoped namespace + CRUD design — Stage 0 invariants matter.

should_trigger.prompt: Add an authenticated GET /api/v1/jukebox/playlists route to my UrsaMU plugin using registerPluginRoute.
should_trigger.rationale: registerPluginRoute + auth guard — Stage 1 + Stage 2 audit territory.

should_trigger.prompt: Override NAMEFORMAT in my UrsaMU plugin so admins render with a star prefix using registerFormatHandler.
should_trigger.rationale: v2.3.0+ format-attribute pipeline — explicitly covered in stage-1 v2.x section.

should_trigger.prompt: Write a system/scripts/ sandbox script for my UrsaMU game that emails a player their stats. Use u.mail.
should_trigger.rationale: system/scripts sandbox + u.mail (sandbox-only API) — Stage 1 sandbox-safety check.

should_trigger.prompt: Audit this UrsaMU plugin's commands.ts for security issues — specifically check canEdit guards and stripSubs usage.
should_trigger.rationale: Explicit UrsaMU audit — should beat generic code-reviewer and tdd-audit because of domain terms.

should_trigger.prompt: Write Deno tests for my UrsaMU +gold command using mockU and mockPlayer helpers — cover happy path, null target, permission denied.
should_trigger.rationale: UrsaMU-specific Deno test patterns + mockU — should beat tdd-workflows/test-driven-development.

should_trigger.prompt: Register a custom lockfunc called 'ingame' in my UrsaMU plugin so locks like 'flag(player) && ingame()' work.
should_trigger.rationale: v2.2.0+ registerLockFunc + && operator — exact v2.x extension-point pattern.

should_not_trigger.prompt: Help me write a RhostMUSH softcode @function that returns the number of connected players.
should_not_trigger.rationale: RhostMUSH softcode is mush-architect / mush-natural territory, NOT UrsaMU TypeScript. Description must disambiguate.

should_not_trigger.prompt: Scaffold a PennMUSH bulletin board with post/read/reply commands.
should_not_trigger.rationale: PennMUSH + softcode bboard belongs to mush-bboard / mush-architect.

should_not_trigger.prompt: Walk me through a TDD red-green-refactor cycle for a Python parser.
should_not_trigger.rationale: Generic TDD with no UrsaMU/Deno/MUSH context — should land on tdd-workflows-tdd-cycle / test-driven-development.

should_not_trigger.prompt: Review the changes on my current branch and give me code review feedback.
should_not_trigger.rationale: Generic PR review — code-reviewer / review skill, not ursamu-dev.

should_not_trigger.prompt: Write a comprehensive README.md for my open-source library.
should_not_trigger.rationale: Generic README authoring — readme / documentation skill, not ursamu-dev.

should_not_trigger.prompt: I want to spec-out a new feature before writing any code. Let's do specify → plan → implement → verify.
should_not_trigger.rationale: Spec-driven-development orchestrator — strong overlap with our stage workflow but no UrsaMU signal. Should route to sdd.

should_not_trigger.prompt: Run a TDD audit on my Node.js Express API for OWASP-class vulnerabilities.
should_not_trigger.rationale: tdd-audit explicitly targets adversarial security review — no UrsaMU markers in the prompt.

should_not_trigger.prompt: Add a slash command to my UrsaMU Discord bot that pings online players.
should_not_trigger.rationale: Says 'UrsaMU' but the work is Discord bot code, not the MUSH engine. SKILL.md 'Do not use when' explicitly excludes this.

should_not_trigger.prompt: How does the TinyMUX 2.x softcode engine evaluate user functions?
should_not_trigger.rationale: Question about softcode interpreter internals — mush-architect / mush-format territory, not UrsaMU plugin authoring.

should_not_trigger.prompt: Generate OpenAPI specs from my existing Express route handlers.
should_not_trigger.rationale: Generic API documentation, not UrsaMU REST. api-documentation skill.
